title: Topic access tracking service with aggregated statistics
purpose: Maintains individual access logs and aggregated statistics for topics, including total counts and recent access patterns.
module_context: Exports a class AccessService that manages database interactions for tracking topic access patterns and maintaining aggregated statistics.

steps.content: Store the database connection for use in all statements.
Prepare all SQL statements for performance optimization.
Initialize the logAccess statement for recording individual access events.
Initialize the ensureCountRecord statement for creating access count records.
Initialize the incrementCount statement for updating total access counts.
Initialize the getCounts statement for retrieving access statistics.
Initialize the calculateLast30Days statement for computing recent access counts.
Initialize the getAllTopicIds statement for retrieving all tracked topic IDs.
Initialize the updateLast30Days statement for updating recent access aggregates.
Initialize the pruneOldLogs statement for cleaning up old access records.
Begin a database transaction for consistency.
Record the individual access event in the access log.
Ensure that an access count record exists for this topic.
Increment the total access count and update the last accessed timestamp.
Commit the transaction to persist all changes.
Retrieve the access count statistics for the specified topic.
IF a record exists for this topic, return it.
ELSE return default values indicating no access history.
Begin a database transaction for consistency.
Retrieve all topic IDs that have access records.
For each topic ID, calculate the count of accesses in the last 30 days.
Update the last_30_days aggregate for each topic.
Remove access log entries older than 90 days.
Commit the transaction to persist all changes.
Create an access count record for a new topic if one does not already exist.
